title: January 14th, 2022
body:
lyrics

i'd look a lot different if the world didn't suck so much
but it does
so i got died every time i didn't fit in
i'm not in the closet
i'm out here scared of y'all
these ain't the droids you're looking for
i just need somewhere to walk
if you really cared you'd a came prepared to talk
but you're not so i wear my feelings out and you can't bear to watch
only time you dare to clock when you can share the op
internal affairs'll drop in, eer body locked in
scopin the optics, captain hissing
take the shot if you got it and listen
don't miss
this isn't your every day quota hit
if we don't get em when they're young
these ones are known to grow too big

they thought they had a box that i could fit in
but when they got tired they stopped trying to find it
now they're sittin on my back bitchin
tried to shake em off so they had to dig in
everything i had to pitch in's in my pack
i never tried to act indigent
